Package sailpoint.object

Class PolicyImpactAnalysis

  • java.lang.Object
    • sailpoint.tools.xml.AbstractXmlObject
      • sailpoint.object.PolicyImpactAnalysis
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, sailpoint.tools.xml.PersistentXmlObject
    public class PolicyImpactAnalysis
extends AbstractXmlObject
    Used to hold the results of an impact analysis on a Policy. These will be stored inside a TaskResult.
    See Also:
